module_description: Monitors DNS resolution for configured hostnames. Verifies that queries return results and optionally checks the resolved value against an expected string.

hints.label: Display name shown in Modules, the status page and notifications (e.g. "MX cerebelum.lan"). Editable; defaults from discovery.
hints.enabled: Enable or disable DNS monitoring for this entry.
hints.threads: Number of entries to check in parallel.
hints.timeout: Resolution timeout in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.host: Hostname to resolve. If empty, the item key is used.
hints.record_type: DNS record type to query: A (IPv4), AAAA (IPv6), CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, PTR or SOA. Types other than A/AAAA require dnspython.
hints.nameserver: DNS server to query (IP or hostname), e.g. 192.168.1.1. Leave empty to use the daemon's system resolver. Requires dnspython.
hints.expected: Optional value that must appear (case-insensitive substring match) in at least one resolved record. Leave empty to only check that the query returns results.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new host name or identifier:

ui.discover_prompt: Enter a domain and run discovery to list its DNS records.
